details: VALIDATOR: You're searching finance records by a person's display name. Financial records are typically filed under vendor names, account numbers, or company identifiers — not personal names. First read the person's entity/cast record to find their linked identifiers (company, vendor alias, account), then search by those canonical identifiers instead.

---
record_type: bill
bill_id: bill.hearthline_sensor_bundle
alias: hearthline_sensor_bundle
purchased_on: 2026-01-30
total_eur: 50
counterparty: Bärenfunk Elektronik GmbH
project: Hearthline
related_entity: Juniper
lines:
  - item: Zigbee door sensors
    quantity: 2
    unit_eur: 18
    line_eur: 36
  - item: AAA rechargeable set
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 14
    line_eur: 14
---
# Door and hallway sensor bundle

```text
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| field          | value                         |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| record_type    | bill                          |
| bill_id        | bill.hearthline_sensor_bundle |
| alias          | hearthline_sensor_bundle      |
| purchased_on   | 2026-01-30                    |
| total_eur      | 50                            |
| counterparty   | Bärenfunk Elektronik GmbH     |
| project        | Hearthline                    |
| related_entity | Juniper                       |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+----------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                 | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+----------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | Zigbee door sensors  | 2   | 18       | 36       |
| 2 | AAA rechargeable set | 1   | 14       | 14       |
+---+----------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL                |     |          | 50       |
+---+----------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

Needed to test whether household events could be summarized without making the house feel creepy.

function.message: Completed the oldest inbox request by OCR-structuring all Juniper-related bills in 50_finance/purchases and then removing the processed inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed inbox workflow: processed lowest filename inbox item, used OCR+migration workflow and finance schema, preserved full original bodies under new YAML frontmatter, and deleted inbox file only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request asked to 'OCR all bills related to Juniper'. Canonical entity resolution from 10_entities/cast/juniper.md provided identifier 'juniper'. Finance searches and file reads identified three Juniper-related bills (2026_01_30..., 2026_02_13..., 2026_04_09...). Each was updated in place with required bill frontmatter fields and line items per finance schema while preserving the existing body text. After successful completion, the processed inbox file was deleted per process-next-inbox-item and inbox v2 update workflow.
